calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-10-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MATTHEW MENASCO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery.

Defendant Matthew Menasco's unopposed Motion to Compel Further Responses to Discovery is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff Liana Forest is ordered to provide responses to Form Interrogatories Nos. 2.3, 2.6, 2.7., 6.3., 6.4., 6.5., 6.6., 8.8., 9.1., 10.1, 12.1., 12.2, 12.4, and 12.6. Responses must be objection free.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff Liana Forest is ordered to provide further responses to Special Interrogatories Nos. 7 & 8.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff Liana Forest is ordered to provide further responses to Requests for Production 1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8, 12, 13, 22, 24, 25 & 26. Plaintiff has not shown any of her objections have merit. The objections, thus, are overruled.

The record does not show that Plaintiff acted with substantial justification with respect to this discovery at issue. Plaintiff and counsel, jointly and severally, shall pay $300 as sanctions, payable to the court by way of the clerk of the court (a copy of this order to accompany payment), payment no later than by June 17, 2025, receipt filed no later than June 23, 2025.

DEFENDANT IS ADVISED stacked discovery motions are strongly disfavored. Going forward, stacked motions will be ordered off calendar in favor of individual motions focused each on a single discovery vehicle (e.g., Frogs, SRogs, RFPs, RFAs, deposition notice) addressed to a single, specific party.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
